nameJP: 焔の拳僧 ニッコー
effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: A dawn upon the world. That is the prayer of "Red Dawn Manor".

nameJP: 焔の巫女 パラマ
effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Rino! Even if it's tough, it's no reason to cry and whine!

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ローナ
effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: The prayers of the "Blaze Maidens" overflows with the light of hope.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ゾンネ
effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: "Red Dawn Manor" has been the holy land of prayers since the era of myths.

nameEN: Blaze Staff Monk, Cho Kuu Sha
nameJP: 焔の杖僧 チョクーシャ
effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: As the prayers reached the heavens, the era without prayers approached its end.
Gathering electricity within itself, it prepares to strike its resented foe.

nameEN: Double Gun of Dust Storm, Bart
nameJP: 砂塵の双銃 バート
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: My beloved guns can breathe fire!

nameEN: Dragon Deity King of Resurgence, Dragveda
nameJP: 再超の竜神王 ドラグヴェーダ
effectEN:
(You may only have one [Over] trigger in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, remove that card, draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn! If revealed during drive check, activate its additional effect!)
Additional Effect - Choose one of your vanguards, and [Stand] it!
flavorTextEN:
Stand up.
Never giving up is the way to open the path forward.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The youth discovered the hidden treasure of legends recorded in videos.

nameJP: 急行竜 スティルディロフォ
flavorTextEN: I'm famished. Where's the prey?

nameJP: 忍竜 ジャエンゴク
flavorTextEN: Be burnt to cinders!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The egg that holds the mana of the Sun. The egg that is full of hope.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):This unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects.
flavorTextEN: You're interesting. Hey hey, lets play together.

nameJP: 白光竜 パラソラース
effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: Babies are bundles of life energy. Even more so for Dinodragon babies.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Just being crushed is not going to be the end of this.

nameJP: 封焔竜 アーヒンサ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: A single blaze is born with the purpose of shining light upon darkness.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on your back row center (RC) from drop, Counter Charge (1).
[DressBoost]-[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, the boosted unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle for each card your "Sealed Blaze Maiden, Bavsargra" is Armed with.
flavorTextEN: The world can simply be destroyed. As long as you wish so.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The crimson wings burn off all kinds of malice.
This needs to be translated.

nameJP: ドラゴンエンパイア 国家王
effectEN: Additional Effect - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn!

(This represents a Momokke Token, and cannot be put in a deck)
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Retire one or more of your other rear-guards], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each unit retired for this cost.
[Glitter]-"Rorowa" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Rorowa" in its card name)
[CONT](RC):If you have a unit with "Radylina" in its card name in the same column as this unit, this unit can attack from the back row.

nameJP: 九尾の妖狐 タマユラ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Won't you come with me?

nameJP: 忍妖 アマヴィエラ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit has attacked two or more times this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle. (Active if this battle is its second attack this turn or more)
flavorTextEN: Exterminating a series of misfortunes, and shining light on the path. The pale sacred light of healing.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if the attack unit's [Critical] is 2 or greater, and its [Critical] is increased by an ability other than trigger effect or its original [Critical] is 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.

[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if the attacking unit's [Critical] is 2 or greater, and its [Critical] is increased by a non-trigger effect ability or its original [Critical] is 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: A small, soothing fire that won't lose even to strong winds.

nameEN: Thundering Dragon King of Battle Dust, Shadlanahda
effectEN: Additional Effect - Choose one of your vanguards, and [Stand] it!

flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Inheriting the powers of the sun and the moon, the shining new hope.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)

flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 焔の闘僧 ソウギョウ
flavorTextEN: This greatsword cloaked in flames, cannot be seen through by mere amateurs!

nameJP: 焔の巫女 レオニー
effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: To drive back the tumult, and surround the battlefield with the timbre of healing.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 アルシェ
flavorTextEN: Adding flames to the spins, bringing the dance to a new level of extreme.

nameJP: 焔の念僧 ハクメー
flavorTextEN: Earnestly striving after a goal is a given for any effort.

nameEN: Can't Quit Sake Stealth Rogue, Shojodoji
nameJP: 斗酒なお辞せず 忍鬼 猩々童子
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Sake is the water of life, and he who defies leads a reckless life.

nameJP: 忍妖 テマリヒメ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your vanguard's grade is less than your opponent's vanguard's grade, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Hey. Can you play with me?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: will+Dress Season2 近導ユウユ
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Burning Flail Dragon".
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.

[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Flare Veil Dragon".
[CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.

[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Blaze Maiden, Parama".
[CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.

nameJP: 忍竜 マドワズ
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 忍竜 ミダレグモ
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 忍竜 ヤミタグリ
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 忍竜 シキンタン
effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 焔の拳僧 エンテン
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted a grade 0, this unit gets [Power]+5000.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ミリン
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your unit with the [overDress] ability attacks, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units with the [overDress] ability, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: As the sound of bells become prayers, a fire is lit in the heart of the sprite.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 リノ
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Blaze Maiden, Reiyu", search your deck for up to one "Trickstar", call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](VC/RC):During the battle this unit attacked, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: Our prayers will definitely reach it!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if "Blaze Maiden, Reiyu" or "Blaze Maiden, Rino" is on your (VC) or (RC), this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I won't lose!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted a vanguard hits, COST  [retire this unit], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's back row rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[ACT](RC):If your opponent's rear-guard was retired this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform one of the following.
•This unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
•Put this unit into your soul, choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or greater rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: The enemy has backed off...Now is the time to attack!

nameJP: 護衛忍竜 ハヤシカゼ
effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I didn't have an opening. "I showed" you one.

nameJP: 過激竜 ヴェロキハザード
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: It noticed you. That is its only reason for attacking.

nameJP: 砂塵の銃撃 ナイジェル
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Cataclysmic Bullet of Dust Storm, Randor", Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire this unit], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Crush your enemies when you can. No need for hesitation.

nameJP: 鉄球竜 アンキボーラー
flavorTextEN: It's heavy and moving at high speed. In other words, it's unstoppable.

nameJP: 忍竜 キザンレイジ
effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards in the same column as this unit, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 忍竜 テンシャーステッド
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire this unit], choose one of your vanguards, search your deck for up to one card with the same card name as that card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: A split-second replacement. The changed appearance misleads everyone.

nameJP: 忍竜 トガチラシ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, you may put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Aim and throw! Make full use of that wrist snap!

nameJP: 忍妖 シガマナゴ
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, COST  [retire this unit], look at the top card of your deck, and you may call a unit card from among them to (RC). If you do not, put the rest into your soul.
flavorTextEN: My loved ones are long gone. Not even regrets are left.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Thunder and flames. Wield them both skillfuly and repel the calamity.

nameJP: 焔の拳僧 テンジ
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your rear-guard is placed, if it was an [overDress], you may draw a card. If you drew, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Nothing will begin by only thinking about it.  Seize it with your own hands.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 アルーナ
effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted a grade 0, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The waltz of flames that delivers prayers must be taught to you as well!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at seven cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one card with the [overDress] ability from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ザーラ
effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if "Blaze Maiden, Reiyu" or "Blaze Maiden, Rino" is on your (VC) or (RC), this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I'm not gonna fall behind either!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a rear-guard, if your opponent has no units in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[CONT](RC):When you would ride from your ride deck, you may ride with "Put this unit into your soul" instead of "Choose a card from your hand, and discard it".
flavorTextEN: The first strike is an honor for warriors! Please leave it to me!

nameEN: Indirect Fire of Dust Storm, Alestor
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if no units are boosting your opponent's attacking unit, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 忍竜 フシマチマドカ
effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your opponent's drop has four or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000. Then, if there are eight or more, it gets [Shield]+5000. (Active on your opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: The waning moon has risen fully. It is our time now.

nameEN: Twin Strike of Dust Storm, Orlando
nameJP: 砂塵の双撃 オーランド
effectEN:
[ACT](Soul):If your opponent's rear-guard was retired this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC).
[AUTO](RC):When your grade 3 or greater vanguard attacks, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Can you keep up with my movement?

nameEN: Hunting Bullet of Dust Storm, Cedric
nameJP: 砂塵の猟弾 セドリック
effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent has two or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Your allies, they are mostly gone. How about you give up too?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a grade 0 rear-guard, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that batte.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 封焔竜 ナモーカール
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) by riding from "Sealed Blaze Dragon, Arhinsa", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one "Sealed Blaze Sword, Prithivih" or "Sealed Blaze Shield, Swayanbuh", reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The burning blaze becomes a guiding light for those who are lost.

nameJP: 封焔竜 シルンガ
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [discard an Arms card from your hand], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: One's determination, will lead the way.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack that this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: It will not end with one slash.

nameJP: 封焔竜 イーシタ
effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000 for each card on your (VC). (Includes Arms, but not the soul)
flavorTextEN: You who shall perish will be tribute for the flames.

nameEN: Throwing Bullet of Dust Storm, Ollie
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, choose a "Throwing Artillery of Dust Storm, Dollie" on your (RC), and you may return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Throwing Artillery of Dust Storm, Dollie
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, choose a "Throwing Bullet of Dust Storm, Ollie" on your (RC), and you may return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Angled Shot of Dust Storm, Alastair
nameJP: 砂塵の曲射 アラスター
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit is not boosted, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: To challenge me on your own... How naive♪

nameJP: 焔の棍僧 レツジ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose up to one card with the [overDress] ability from your drop, and put it into your hand. If your vanguard is grade 4, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: A faint hope that leads to tomorrow. A fragment of which is in this hand.

nameJP: 焔の拳僧 チョウキ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [reveal a grade 4 card from your hand], and this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: A firm and sacred prayer will overthrow the predicament.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 トーニャ
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle that this unit boosted a "Blaze Maiden, Sonya", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], retire all of your rear-guards in the same column as this unit, search your deck for up to one unit card with grade+1 or greater than your vanguard, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Yes! Our prayers! You'll see that it will reach the ends of the skies!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a vanguard, if the boosted unit is [Stand], COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, retire it, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your turn, [Stand] this unit and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ヒメナ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at seven cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one card with the [overDress] ability from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Elegant prayers reverberate across the skies, awakening the power of the spirits.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a grade 0 rear-guard, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that batte.
flavorTextEN: I, shall become the shield to protect the weak.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a rear-guard, if your opponent has no units in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I'll support you! Full speed ahead!

nameJP: 忍竜 アマタチギリ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have more rear-guards than your opponent, you may draw a card. If you do, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Don't let your guard down even with this advantage in materials.

nameEN: Lobbed Bullet of Dust Storm, Ooley
nameJP: 砂塵の擲弾 オーリー
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, choose a "Lobbed Artillery of Dust Storm, Dooley" on your (RC), and you may return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: My little brother will release resolutely too!!

nameEN: Lobbed Artillery of Dust Storm, Dooley
nameJP: 砂塵の擲砲 ドーリー
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, choose a "Lobbed Bullet of Dust Storm, Ooley" on your (RC), and you may return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: Big brother will release magnificently!!

nameJP: 堅鋭竜 ゲイツフォート
effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your turn, [Stand] this unit and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The tenacious jaw lusts insatiably for the prey before its eyes.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)] and this unit gets [Power]+5000 for each of your other grade 1 or less rear-guards until end of that battle.

nameJP: 穏やかな日差しの中で タマユラ
nameRomaji: Odayakana Hizashi no Naka de tamayura
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "Nine-tailed Fox Spirit, Tamayura", look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Ririmi" or "Rarami" in its card name or a Fox Art card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: May days like these continue forever.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may look at seven cards from the top of your deck. If you do, choose up to one normal unit with "Stealth" in its card name or  [Glitter] from among them, put it into your soul, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The crazed dance of thunder resounds on the uninhabited plains.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your soul has a grade 3, this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Respond to your savage soul and strike with all your might!

nameJP: 封焔竜 サムサーラ
effectEN:
[CONT](RC):This unit gets all of the following according to the Arms on your (VC).
• Right Deity Arms - During your turn, it gets [Power]+5000.
• Left Deity Arms - It gets "Intercept".
flavorTextEN: The sun and moon oppose each other and become the light which shines upon this world.

nameJP: 焔の密僧 カゲリ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: It's okay! You all can definitely do it!
